name: me.openbrowser/openbrowser-ai
description: AI browser automation. Write async Python to navigate, click, type, and extract data.

environmentVariables.name: OPENBROWSER_ALLOWED_DOMAINS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of allowed domains (empty for no restrictions)

environmentVariables.name: OPENBROWSER_COMPACT_DESCRIPTION
environmentVariables.description: Use minimal tool description (~500 tokens instead of ~1,430)

environmentVariables.name: OPENBROWSER_MAX_OUTPUT
environmentVariables.description: Maximum output characters per code execution (default: 10000)
